x-component.description: Cleans strings by normalizing quotes, punctuation, etc. ready for further processing. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

checkCharacters.title: Check for corrupt or unexpected characters

matchRegexExpressions.title: Mark segments matching default regular expressions for removal

matchUserRegex.title: Mark segments matching user defined regular expressions for removal

pruneTextUnit.title: Remove unnecessary segments from text unit

normalizePunctuations.title: Standardize spaces before and after certain punctuation marks to English writing style.

keepCrNlIntact.title: Keep CR and NL characters intact. They are not normalized to an ASCII space with spaces and tabs.
